positive: Minimalist stylized mountain range silhouette with vibrant bioluminescent flora and fauna. The mountains should feature sharp, clean geometry and a deep indigo to sapphire gradient. The foreground elements, including stylized trees, geometric rivers, and small glowing creatures, should be rendered in bright teal, electric purple, and luminous cyan. Focus on strong negative space and high contrast, giving it an ethereal, nighttime cyberpunk aesthetic. Vector art quality, screen printing style, flat graphic design, perfectly symmetrical, centered composition, suitable for apparel print.
